summary: Full-stack developer with 4+ years building web applications. Strong in React, TypeScript, and Python REST APIs, with a focus on performance and clean UX.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and shipped a React + TypeScript dashboard used by 10k monthly users.
Designed REST APIs in Python (FastAPI) and reduced p95 latency by 40%.
Set up CI/CD with GitHub Actions and containerized services with Docker.

experience.title: Junior Developer
bullets: Implemented responsive UIs and improved Lighthouse scores from 62 to 95.
Wrote unit tests with Jest, raising coverage from 30% to 80%.

education.details: Graduated with honors. Focus on web systems and databases.
